### createStore()

创建一个 mini store

```typescript
createStore: <Value>(defaultValue: Value) => {
    set: (value: Value) => void;
    get: () => Value;
    subscribe: (cb: StoreListener<Value>) => StoreDisposer;
}
```

#### createStore的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  defaultValue | Value |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

{ set: (value: Value) =&gt; void; get: () =&gt; Value; subscribe: (cb: [StoreListener](#storelistener) &lt;Value&gt;) =&gt; [StoreDisposer](#storedisposer) ; }
